body:
Codex review: APPROVED (content; hold for CI)

I reviewed #305 at `1a0ced2` as the dedicated `EGUIHOST-MENU-EXTRACTION` follow-up.

Content/scope checks:
- Diff is the intended structural extraction: new `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs`, `lib.rs` imports the helpers back, and `menu_tests.rs` only repoints docs/imports.
- `lib.rs` is back under the cap (`836` lines by raw line count) and there are zero `SPLIT-EXEMPTION` markers under `crates/editor-egui-host/src`.
- No Cargo/edge changes.
- The moved menu helpers keep the same behavior: registration order, shortcut values, Play/View `None` deferral, `play_item_enabled`, and `menu_item` all move into the private `menu` module with `pub(crate)` visibility for the host/tests.
- Stale-prose/path sweep is clean: no live references to the removed exemption or old `super::build_main_menu_entries` / `super::play_item_enabled` paths.
- `git diff --check` is clean.

CI status at review time: still running (`cargo bench`, workspace tests, and `Analyze (rust)` in progress), PR `MERGEABLE/UNSTABLE`. Content is approved; merge should wait for CI to finish green plus explicit human authorization.
